calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 16, 2015, in Department 525:
Erik P. Weiss, Esq., (415) 788-1900, specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant for U-Haul Co. of California.
Matthew G. Richardson appears as propria persona with witness Michael Preciado.

Mr. Richardson walks in at 9:47am with his witness while Mr. Weiss is testifying on behalf of U-Haul Co. Clerk administered the oath to Mr. Richardson and Mr. Preciado.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Mr. Weiss is sworn.
Mr. Weiss testifies on behalf of U-Haul Co. of California and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - declaration of Mr. Benyi, Mr. Moore, and Mr. Abordo from U-Haul, Itemized list of charges, police report, and various exhibits.

Mr. Richardson testifies on his own behalf by reading his own written documentary and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - copy of pictures, itemized list of missing documents,

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf Jr.; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-27-15 At 06:30 P.M. In Dept 506
